allow: Bash(python -c "from app import create_app; app = create_app\(\); print\('App created successfully!'\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Fault handling:', d['fault_handling']\); print\('Waiting service:', d['waiting_area_service']\); [print\(f'{c[\\"charger_no\\"]}: {c[\\"status\\"]}, queue: {c[\\"queue_count\\"]}'\) for c in d['chargers']]")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('系统运行中!'\); print\(f'快充电桩: {len\([c for c in d[\\"chargers\\"] if c[\\"type\\"]==\\"fast\\"]\)}个'\); print\(f'慢充电桩: {len\([c for c in d[\\"chargers\\"] if c[\\"type\\"]==\\"slow\\"]\)}个'\); print\(f'等候区容量: {d[\\"waiting_area\\"][\\"capacity\\"]}'\); print\(f'当前时间: {d[\\"current_time\\"][:19]}'\)")
